item.title: AGIBOT携APC 2026登陆澳大利亚和新西兰，打造专业合作伙伴生态体系，加速嵌入式AI本地部署
item.summary: MELBOURNE, Australia, July 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- AGIBOT, a global leader in embodied AI and robotics, hosted the Australia and New Zealand AGIBOT Partner Conference (APC) 2026 in Melbourne, marking an important step in AGIBOT's long-term commitment to supporting local partners, customers and embodied AI deployment a
